subject: [PATCH v6 1/3] x86/tdx: Fix off-by-one in port I/O handling

reviews.author: Dave Hansen
reviews.summary: The patch has been merged into the x86/tdx branch of tip. No comments or feedback provided.

2026-07-13.patch_summary: This patch series addresses an off-by-one error in the port I/O handling code for x86/tdx architecture. The issue arises from the use of GENMASK macro, which includes one extra bit in the mask calculation. This results in a wider mask than intended, causing issues with I/O operations. The patch fixes this by adjusting the mask calculation to exclude the extra bit.
